notable_excerpts: Good progression in terms of what we see clearly moving towards our target of 2030.
Reduction in specific hazardous waste, reduction in specific effluent, reduction in Scope 1&2 emission.
Renewable electricity is another big area in terms of what we keep on looking at along with the bio-based materials.
We continue to look at our employee engagement very strongly from the point of view of looking at equity, diversity and engagement.
Increasing the livelihoods of a lot of artisans in this country and skilling them.
We did almost about 9.5 lakh trainings last year. This year we've already done about 4.4 lakh training.
We are aware that there could be some volatility which can happen because of geopolitical uncertainty.
The transcript has also been uploaded on the Company’s website and can be accessed through the following link.

chain_of_thought: The company has made significant strides in environmental sustainability, particularly in emissions reduction and renewable energy. Social initiatives are robust, focusing on employee engagement and community training. Governance disclosures are present but less detailed, focusing on risk awareness and transparency.
strengths: Comprehensive social programs for employee and community development.
weaknesses: Governance disclosures lack depth and specificity.
